message:
style(tests): apply rustfmt formatting to notify_bug and wasm_react_example_contract

Applies consistent Rust formatting across two test files:

- notify_bug.rs: Normalize trailing whitespace on blank lines, wrap the
  long `assert_eq!` macro call with the "lost wakeup" message across
  multiple lines to stay within the standard line-length limit, and
  reorder `use` imports alphabetically (std::sync::Arc before std::task).

- wasm_react_example_contract.rs: Break the long `assert!` macro call
  with the "React consumer fixture directory must exist" message across
  multiple lines for readability.

No functional changes — purely whitespace and line-wrapping adjustments
produced by rustfmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
